case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. JONATHAN C DORSCH et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-08-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). OSC TO PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY JANALIE A. HENRIQUES. THE APR-05-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DORSCH, JONATHAN C $1,947.55 PRINCIPAL, $138.20 INTEREST, $141.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,226.75, TOTAL $2,226.75
